title: coleus affinis
intro: Coleus affinis, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coleus affinis include its use in treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its application in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional to ensure safe and effective application.
